items.title: CGDV: Proven To Be More Effective Than Peers
items.description: Capital Group Dividend Value ETF has proven to be more resilient than traditional index-tracking ETFs during market declines. Learn why CGDV is a Buy.

items.title: Nasdaq Correction: The Best Magnificent Seven Stock to Buy on the Dip Right Now
items.description: The technology-heavy Nasdaq Composite index currently finds itself in correction territory.  There is a chance the recent pullback will turn into something worse, such as a prolonged bear market.  Over the past 10 years, the Nasdaq has corrected six times, good for about once every 1.67 years.

items.title: If I Could Buy Only 1 "Magnificent Seven" Stock Over the Next 10 Years, This Would Be It (Hint: It's Not Nvidia)
items.description: Nvidia has been the top-performing stock among the "Magnificent Seven" over the last few years, but I see another megacap AI stock as the better long-term buy.

items.title: BlackRock Sustainable Advantage Large Cap Core Fund Q4 2024 Commentary
items.description: BlackRock Sustainable Advantage Large Cap Core Fund posted returns of 1.60% (Institutional shares) and 1.57% (Investor A shares, without sales charge) for the fourth quarter of 2024.

items.title: Certain That AI Is In A Bubble? Then Don't Read This
items.description: US growth stocks, especially in AI and tech, are attractive. Read why investors should consider buying discounted growth stocks like AMZN, META, NVDA, and GOOGL.
